div.h3: Technical Specification: Thundering Herd Mitigation Strategy

div.p: Final Implementation Requirement: This algorithm must be coupled with a Single-Flight (Coalescing) mechanism. Probabilistic logic distributes the decision to refresh, but Single-Flight ensures that exactly one upstream fetch occurs, even if multiple clients concurrently decide to refresh during the early window.
Total Size: 40 Bytes + 24 Bytes Internal Padding Alignment: 8-byte (64-bit word) Cache Line Impact: Fits in single 64B L1 Cache Line
Event Key ◆ GREEN: Cache Hit (Stale data acceptable) ◆ ORANGE: Probabilistic Win (Early fetch started) ◆ GREY: Request Coalesced (Single-flight in progress)

g.title: int64 Total duration for window calc
Calculated P=0.05 vs Rand=0.88 -> Skip Refresh
Calculated P=0.15 vs Rand=0.42 -> Skip Refresh
Calculated P=0.45 vs Rand=0.12 -> TRIGGER REFRESH
